title: [TUI] Audit crates/tui coordinate and layout contracts
description: Umbrella subtask under tk-avhl. Review crates/tui coordinate-space rules, layout overflow behavior, render-area assumptions, and buffer/write invariants. Produce prioritized findings and convert them into explicit tests/guards so custom canvases cannot silently misuse the API again.

logs.msg: Audit scope confirmed by user feedback: custom tui lib likely has additional hidden bugs/edge cases beyond current footer issues. Need a stack-level review of buffer coordinates, layout area semantics, inline reserve ownership, and widget rendering contracts.

Contract audit pass implemented: clarified widget/canvas docs to state areas are frame-buffer absolute, not terminal-global; added terminal tests for bottom-anchored inline region + stale-clear union math. Remaining audit work is broader PTY/interaction validation and any additional edge cases surfaced there.
